summary: Phase 2 share-link feature fully verified end-to-end. Extended backend pytest suite from 31 to 44 tests (13 new TestShareLinks cases) - all 44 PASS. Frontend verified via Playwright: SharePanel on Overview tab gates DRAFT/SCRIPT_GENERATED with the unshareable message, COMPLETED project allows full enable/copy/open/title-override save+cancel/regenerate/disable flow; public /s/{token} page loads anonymously with title, copy chips, CTA to /register, footer, and old token 404s after regenerate.

issues: Pre-existing Recharts warning: width(-1) height(-1) on initial render - NOT a share-link regression; flagged in iteration_1.

critical_code_review_comments: routes.py now 743 lines - strongly recommend splitting into auth.py/projects.py/generation.py/share.py routers before adding more features.
enable_share() does 2 reads (find_one + updated) - could use find_one_and_update with ReturnDocument.AFTER to save one round-trip. Minor perf nit.
Public /public/share/{token} increments view_count on every GET - no IP/session de-dup, so refreshing spams the counter. Acceptable for MVP but note it is not analytics-grade.
SharePanel.jsx uses window.confirm for regenerate - fine functionally but inconsistent with the app's dark/mono design system; consider a dark dialog component for visual consistency.
PublicSharePage renders the Toaster with position top-right; sonner toast renders are fine but uses axios directly instead of the app's `api` wrapper (intentional since no auth cookies needed - OK).
seed_data_creation: Used the existing seeded COMPLETED project (AI Is Quietly Replacing Stock Traders). No manual seeding needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py has TestShareLinks class with 13 tests (enable/400-for-draft, view block, title-override, clear-on-empty, public anon access + private-field scrub, unknown/short-token 404, view_count increment, regenerate rotates+resets+invalidates old, disable->public 404, cross-owner 403, admin allowed). Run: cd /app/backend && pytest tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend share flow testids: share-panel, share-enable-btn, share-url-input, share-copy-btn, share-open-btn, share-regenerate-btn, share-disable-btn, share-title-edit, share-title-input, share-title-save, share-title-cancel, share-view-count, share-display-title, share-copy-title/description/tags/pinned, share-cta-register. Post-login app navigates to /app not /dashboard; projects are at /app/projects. Accept window.confirm via page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()).
rca of the issue: No bugs. One playwright timing quirk: the app redirects post-login to /app (not /dashboard as my first script assumed). Adjusted to wait_for_timeout + direct navigation to /app/projects and all tests passed.
